title: NGE on GYAO free service starts today
display_title: NGE on GYAO free service starts today
wikitext:
[]: NGE on GYAO free service starts today             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Aug 17, 2015 9:12 pm I could have sworn I made a thread about this (which apparently disappeared?) but anyway: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) All free, in anticipation of the BD boxset. So far, episodes 1-8 are uploaded. http://gyao.yahoo.co.jp/p/00252/v10034/

[]:             Quote Post by Tumbling Down » Wed Aug 19, 2015 10:55 pm How's the quality?
